problem: 92% of New Year’s resolutions fail due to a lack of real-world verification and adaptive accountability.
solution: Project Cerebro is an autonomous accountability ecosystem that verifies real-world actions and provides adaptive accountability through multi-agent AI systems.

target_market.summary: Initially targeting career-oriented individuals, with plans to expand to fitness, language learning, creative projects, and more.
target_market.segment: Career-oriented individuals, job seekers, software engineers, career switchers, international and graduate applicants.

financials.revenue: Freemium model with estimated pricing of $10-20/month for individual, $25-50/month for pro, team tiers custom.
